scenario_description: The user first asks the agent to fill in this year's achievements, then adds next year's work plan.

command:
printf 'Annual Work Summary (Template)

Department:
Author:
Date: December 31, 2025

I. Annual Work Overview

II. Major Achievements
1. 
2. 
3. 

III. Highlights

IV. Issues and Improvement Areas

V. Next Year's Work Plan
' > /home/user/Desktop/work_summary.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add this year's main achievement: Delivered 3 major projects
Now add next year's plan: Expand into new markets and add two product lines, then save
